.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 8 for the build environment.

.github/workflows/mavenpublish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 1.8 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6.x APIs required for modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping 11 would result in mismatched bytecode or build failures if toolchains are enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 (Leyton) to match Spring Boot 3.3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2020.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it would cause dependency resolution conflicts or runtime classpath errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Starter version to 4.1.7 to align with the new Spring Cloud release train.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older starter versions rely on Spring Boot 2.x APIs and will fail to resolve or initialize correctly with Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Netflix Eureka Client version to 4.1.6 for Spring Cloud 2023.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Eureka Client 3.x is not compatible with the updated Spring Cloud Netflix dependencies in the 2023 release train.

pom.xml.general_idea: Downgrade JAXB version property to 2.3.9 to use the Jakarta EE 8 compatible version (javax namespace) or align with Spring Boot 3 managed dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB 3.0.0 uses the jakarta namespace which may conflict with legacy code or specific Spring Boot 3 managed versions that expect 2.3.x (javax) or specific 2.3.9 builds.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SpringDoc OpenAPI version to 2.6.0 to support Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: SpringDoc 1.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE); it will fail to compile or start due to missing javax.servlet classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-starter-actuator, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-devtools, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-starter-data-jpa, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-starter-security, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf, relying on parent management.
Update SpringDoc artifact ID to springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact springdoc-openapi-ui is deprecated/removed in SpringDoc 2.x; using it will result in dependency resolution failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit dependency on liquibase-core, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-kafka, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on ehcache, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on javax.cache cache-api, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on javax.validation validation-api, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on jaxb-core, relying on parent management or removal.
Remove explicit dependency on jaxb-impl, relying on parent management or removal.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-kafka-test, relying on parent management.
Remove explicit dependency on spring-boot-starter-test, relying on parent management.
